CIPHER.1234.cipherString: A major black iron ore discovery in the 'middle of nowhere' led to the planned creation of the hub of the North.
CIPHER.1234.question: The following quote needs to be decoded with the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?

CIPHER.1235.cipherString: A sad tale's best for winter. I have one of sprites and goblins.
CIPHER.1235.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by William Shakespeare, written as an Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1235.author: William Shakespeare

CIPHER.1236.cipherString: In this life, do not take things lightly all the time. Have the wisdom to discern when things are serious.
CIPHER.1236.question: Solve this quote by Gift Gugu Mona that has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1236.author: Gift Gugu Mona

CIPHER.1237.cipherString: That I could clamber to the frozen moon And draw the ladder after me.
CIPHER.1237.question: While repairing an old telescope, you find a note hidden in the tube. The message is a quote written in a Porta using a keyword of QUIET. What does it say?

CIPHER.1238.cipherString: Magic will happen, Just distance yourself from negativity.
CIPHER.1238.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Brajesh Kumar Singh, written in a Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword of SHAZAM and polybius key of JUSTIFYINGLY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1238.author: Brajesh Kumar Singh

CIPHER.1239.cipherString: There were giants in the earth in those days.
CIPHER.1239.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote, encrypted using a Baconian. What does it say?

CIPHER.1240.cipherString: Project management is becoming more important as equipment, systems, and projects become more complex.
CIPHER.1240.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote, encoded as a Caesar. What does it say?

CIPHER.1241.cipherString: Truly charismatic people, in my experience, don't come along very often.
CIPHER.1241.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Francesca Annis encoded using a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword length of 4. The 27th through 37th cipher units (47 95 54 66 28 62 45 55 25 74 44) decode to be EXPERIENCED. What does it say?
CIPHER.1241.author: Francesca Annis

CIPHER.1242.cipherString: Any great warrior is also a scholar, and a poet, and an artist.
CIPHER.1242.question: You came across the following written on a wall in a cave. You are told that it's a quote by Steven Seagal encoded as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has OLAR in it corresponding to the encoded text C L A B N I T, meaning A = ●–●; B = ●×●; C = ●×–; I = –●×; L = ––×; N = –×●; T = ×●–. What does it say?
CIPHER.1242.author: Steven Seagal

CIPHER.1243.cipherString: I get most of my daily exercise from shrugging.
CIPHER.1243.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote, written in a Baconian. You are told that the deciphered text starts with I GET. What does it say?

CIPHER.1244.cipherString: Finalmente, voy a comprar unos recuerdos para mi familia y amigos. Por ejemplo, ropa de alpaca para el invierno.
CIPHER.1244.question: This is a passage from someone's Spanish-language diary entry about their travels in Perú. It has been encrypted as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to solve.

CIPHER.1245.question: This quote from The Land Before Time IV: Journey Through the Mists has been encoded as an Affine cipher with a=11 and b=7. What does it say?
CIPHER.1245.author: The Land Before Time IV: Journey Through the Mists

CIPHER.1246.cipherString: The fiercest serpent may be overcome by a swarm of ants.
CIPHER.1246.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Isoroku Yamamoto, encoded using a Baconian Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1246.author: Isoroku Yamamoto

CIPHER.1247.cipherString: Someone told me that when they go to Vermont, they feel like they are home.
CIPHER.1247.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Caroline Rhea, written in a Checkerboard with a polybius key of APPALACHIANS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1247.author: Caroline Rhea

CIPHER.1248.cipherString: I have no hostility to nature, but a child's love to it. I expand and live in the warm day like corn and melons.
CIPHER.1248.question: A laser-etched message on the inside of a geode crystal reads: solve this Aristocrat version of Ralph Waldo Emerson's wisdom. What does it say?
CIPHER.1248.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

CIPHER.1249.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote encrypted as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 1447 87236 decode to?

CIPHER.1250.cipherString: I work with all these amazing voice actors that do a kajillion voices.
CIPHER.1250.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Atbash encoded quote by Katey Sagal. What does it say?
CIPHER.1250.author: Katey Sagal

CIPHER.1251.cipherString: see the beauty of all before you
CIPHER.1251.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by Paramanhansa Yogananda encoded as an Affine. You are told that the cipher text ZO decodes to be OF. What does it say?
CIPHER.1251.author: Paramanhansa Yogananda

CIPHER.1252.cipherString: One could take down a book from a shelf ten times more wise and witty than almost any man's conversation.
CIPHER.1252.question: A famous phrase by Campbell has been encoded as a Caesar cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1252.author: Campbell

CIPHER.1253.cipherString: En el jardín el concierto va a empezar. De repente, suenan las primeras notes en una guitarra. Luego, la orquesta toca su parte.
CIPHER.1253.question: This quote is from a passage written in Spanish about attending an event. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decode. What does it say?

CIPHER.1254.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Cryptarithm encoded quote. What do the values 8098 13672029 decode to?

CIPHER.1255.cipherString: The universe is so well balanced that the mere fact that you have a problem also serves as a sign that there is a solution.
CIPHER.1255.question: This string of symbols appears on the display of a malfunctioning calculator. It hides an observation about difficulties by Steve Maraboli, encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains A SIGN corresponding to the ciphertext Z MWEJ on the second line. What does it say?
CIPHER.1255.author: Steve Maraboli

CIPHER.1256.cipherString: What can be added to the happiness of a man who is in health, out of debt, and has a clear conscience?
CIPHER.1256.question: The school's ancient overhead projector flickered and burned this Complete Columnar message onto the screen—decode Adam Smith. The quote has DEBT AND somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1256.author: Adam Smith

CIPHER.1257.cipherString: Now, on nights that I can't sleep, I play video games alone until the morning.
CIPHER.1257.question: While scrolling through an old floppy disk labeled "TOP SECRET", you discovered this quote by Namie Amuro hidden as a Porta. The 46th through 53rd cipher characters (LABPSLQR) decode to be UNTIL THE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1257.author: Namie Amuro

CIPHER.1258.cipherString: Art enriches itself by eliminating artificial barriers between people such as borders between countries.
CIPHER.1258.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Neelie Kroes encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.1258.author: Neelie Kroes

CIPHER.1259.cipherString: One glance at a book and you hear the voice of another person, perhaps someone dead for a thousand years. To read is to voyage through time.
CIPHER.1259.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Carl Sagan about reading, encrypted as a Patristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains VOICE corresponding to the ciphertext letters ZUJEG near the end of the first line. What does it say?
CIPHER.1259.author: Carl Sagan

CIPHER.1260.cipherString: He talked, and listened, and tried to do the hardest thing of all. To understand.
CIPHER.1260.question: A quote by Chad Oliver has been encoded using the Checkerboard Cipher for you to decode. The deciphered text ends with UNDERSTAND. What does it say?
CIPHER.1260.author: Chad Oliver

CIPHER.1261.cipherString: The surest way of concealing from others the boundaries of one's own knowledge is not to overstep them.
CIPHER.1261.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain—decode this Aristocrat cipher text by Giacomo Leopardi. What does it say?
CIPHER.1261.author: Giacomo Leopardi

CIPHER.1262.cipherString: Climbing is performed in the same posture as creeping.
CIPHER.1262.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Fractionated Morse puzzle reveals a quote by Swift. You are told that the quote has FORMED in it corresponding to the encoded text O B K A V T F Y, meaning A = ●–●; B = ●×–; F = –●●; K = ––×; O = ●●–; T = ×●×; V = ×––; Y = ××●. You are also told that the cipher contains the word THE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1262.author: Swift

CIPHER.1263.cipherString: Let them call it mischief; When it is past and prospered it will be virtue.
CIPHER.1263.question: Decrypt the following cipher text that has been encoded using the Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has MISCHIEF somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1263.author: Ben Jonson
